name: ruby-get-process-mem
title: ruby-get-process-mem
summary: get memory usage of a process in Ruby
description:
get memory usage of a process in Ruby
Use GetProcessMem to find out the amount of RAM used by any process. Supports
retrieval of memory usage in units of bytes, kilobytes, megabytes and
gigabytes.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-get-process-mem because get memory usage of a process in Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-get-process-mem as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-get-process-mem with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-get-process-mem --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
